There's several lush patches of black elderberries growing along the South edge of Lohmann Park. Read up before using this powerful medicinal plant. The flowers and berries make wonderful cold remedies.

There are several spots where raspberries are growing wildly at Lohmann Park. In the southwest corner there is a thicket that is doing quite well.

Rows of Juneberry plants in the median. Parked on the street and foraged here and neighbors did not seem to mind. We came in mid-June and already found that the fruit had dried up, so it might be best to try towards the start of the month. Access: Private but
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.

Apple a few houses down from Anderson/Fairlawn intersection. They're small, but sweet. Ripening around late July. Access: Private. Falling Fruit season: July-unknown.

Native pawpaws! These large trees had lots of fruit in 2011. Many perfectly ripe fruits were found on morning walks just sitting there on the sidewalk.
Huge pear tree (40 ft) on the SW corner of California and Cottage Grove. Tons of pears in late Sep 2009.
